english: some time ago / a while ago
notes: Temporal adverbial phrase used with past tenses (Perfekt or Präteritum). 'Einiger' is an indefinite determiner meaning 'some', agreeing with 'Zeit' (feminine dative after 'vor').

sentences.german: Vor einiger Zeit habe ich einen neuen Job angefangen.
sentences.english: Some time ago, I started a new job.
